summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All features for the new Browse Loans section and exploration-first flow are working correctly. Key verifications: (1) After login, users land on landing page (/) not /dashboard, (2) Landing page shows 35 loan products with category filters, (3) Logged-in navbar shows Dashboard, user name, logout button, (4) Hero CTAs change based on login state, (5) Category filter pills work correctly, (6) Apply Now navigates to /onboarding for logged-in users without profile, (7) Apply Now navigates to /register for logged-out users, (8) Register redirects to / not /onboarding.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: GET /api/loans/products returns 35 products (public, no auth required)
Backend: Loan products have all required fields (product_id, bank_name, product_name, loan_type, interest_rate, max_amount, max_tenure_months, processing_fee_pct, features)
Backend: Category filter personal returns 13 products
Backend: Category filter home returns 10 products
Backend: Category filter car returns 6 products
Backend: Category filter bike returns 3 products
Backend: Category filter education returns 3 products
Backend: All 5 expected categories present (personal, home, car, bike, education)
Backend: Login with valid credentials returns 200 (no 429 errors)
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: Multiple failed login attempts return 401 (no 429 rate limiting)
Backend: Register endpoint works for new users
Backend: /auth/me requires authentication
Backend: 18+ unique banks in products
Backend: All products have valid interest rates (5-20%)
Backend: All products have valid max_amount
Backend: All products have valid tenure
Frontend: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, stats, browse-loans, features, how-it-works, trust, our-story, savings-stats, emi-calculator, cta, footer)
Frontend: Logged-out navbar shows Login and Find Best Loan buttons
Frontend: Hero shows 'Find Best Loan' and 'I have an account' CTAs for logged-out users
Frontend: Browse Loans section shows 35 loan product cards
Frontend: Category filter pills present (All, Personal Loan, Home Loan, Car Loan, Bike Loan, Education Loan)
Frontend: Category filter 'All' shows 35 cards
Frontend: Category filter 'Personal Loan' shows 13 cards
Frontend: Category filter 'Home Loan' shows 10 cards
Frontend: Category filter 'Car Loan' shows 6 cards
Frontend: Category filter 'Bike Loan' shows 3 cards
Frontend: Category filter 'Education Loan' shows 3 cards
Frontend: Loan cards show bank logo, product name, bank name, interest rate, max amount, tenure, processing fee, features badges
Frontend: Login redirects to landing page (/) not /dashboard
Frontend: Logged-in navbar shows Dashboard button, user name, logout button
Frontend: Hero shows 'Browse Loans' and 'Get Personalized Picks' CTAs for logged-in users
Frontend: Onboarding nudge banner appears for logged-in users without profile
Frontend: Apply Now button navigates to /onboarding for logged-in users without profile
Frontend: Apply Now button navigates to /register for logged-out users
Frontend: Register redirects to landing page (/) not /onboarding
Frontend: Dashboard route redirects to /onboarding for users without profile (expected behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: RegisterPage.js line 45: Google login redirect still points to /dashboard instead of / - inconsistent with email registration redirect. Consider updating for consistency.
Location detection may not work in automated testing due to geolocation permissions - this is expected behavior, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and created test users during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Browse Loans features verified working. Landing page now shows 35 loan products with category filtering. Login/Register redirect to landing page (/) instead of /dashboard. Users without profile see onboarding nudge banner and Apply Now navigates to /onboarding. Dashboard still requires profile completion. Location detection uses browser geolocation + OpenStreetMap Nominatim (may not work in headless testing).

mocked_apis.Location detection: Uses browser geolocation + OpenStreetMap Nominatim reverse geocode - may not work in automated testing

features_verified.browse_loans_section: 35 loan products displayed with bank logos, interest rates, amounts, tenure, processing fees, features
features_verified.category_filtering: All 6 categories work (All, Personal, Home, Car, Bike, Education)
features_verified.logged_in_navbar: Shows Dashboard, user name, logout button
features_verified.logged_out_navbar: Shows Login, Find Best Loan buttons
features_verified.hero_ctas_logged_out: Find Best Loan, I have an account
features_verified.onboarding_nudge: Appears for logged-in users without profile
features_verified.apply_now_logged_in: Navigates to /onboarding for users without profile
